data.content: Plan: make the self-update summary repo-aware by consulting git hook health from `src/git_hooks.rs` and suppress the post-upgrade hint only when the current repo's hooks check passes. Preserve the hint for missing/stale/legacy hooks and likely for non-repo contexts. Test via focused self-manage/main regression tests that exercise shared summary logic rather than a real networked self-upgrade. Risk: `kno upgrade` exits before normal project context initialization in `main`, and the knot text still mentions the older `kno hooks install` wording while current code/changelog point at `kno doctor`.
